title: DSpark: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference [pdf]
author: aurenvale
aiHeadline: AI models are so slow these days, they need a 'Turbo' button to keep up. DSpark's speculative decoding might just be the caffeine boost they need.

title: Anonymous GitHub account mass-dropping undisclosed 0-days
author: binyu
aiHeadline: An anonymous GitHub account is dropping 0-days like they're handing out candy. It's like a hacker group's version of a 'ransom note,' but without the ransom.

title: Zuckerberg's war on whistleblowers
author: HotGarbage
aiHeadline: Zuckerberg's latest move is like a corporate war, but instead of battleships, it's lawsuits. It's 'Zuckerman's Revenge' against whistleblowers who dare to speak the truth.

title: OpenRA
author: tosh
aiHeadline: OpenRA brings back the nostalgia of classic RTS games, proving that sometimes, old-school is better than all the shiny new stuff.

title: Fintech Engineering Handbook
author: signa11
aiHeadline: The Fintech Engineering Handbook is here to teach you how to make money, or at least understand the scams that do. It's the ultimate guide to the art of finance.
